
## Policy datasets

The UN Refugee Agencies Funding (URAF) Dataset (dataset on state donations to the UNHCR and UNRWA 1990-2025)

Refugee Dispersal Policy (RDP) Data Set (subnational responsibility-sharing in asylum governance, 32 European countries in the year 2020) Dataset article

Migration Provisions in Preferential Trade Agreements (MITA) Dataset (migration-related content of trade agreements worldwide, 1960 - 2020) Dataset article

RESET-OECD dataset (Resettlement policy indicators for OECD countries, 1980 - 2019) Data / Codebook


For replication data of publications, see [here](publications.qmd)
